descriptions: Barreca was allied with Zito-Bertuca in the second 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: insieme ai Libri, i Tegano, i Latella, i Paviglianiti e gli Zito-Bertuca

descriptions: Zito-Bertuca is a family linked to Condello.
edges.evidence_quote: viene ricostruito l'attuale organigramma dei Condello e della famiglia ad essa collegata degli Zito-Bertuca

descriptions: Both groups were linked to the IronMarch forum, indicating a shared platform but not a direct relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: the Neo-fascist and Neo-Nazi web forum IronMarch.org, which, prior to its shutdown in 2017, had been linked to several acts of Neo-Nazi terrorism and violent militant groups such as ... National Action

descriptions: Former National Action members formed the British branch of Atomwaffen.
edges.evidence_quote: British neo-Nazi terrorists from the former National Action who went on to form the British branch of the Atomwaffen Division

descriptions: An individual was connected to both National Action and Sonnenkrieg Division.
edges.evidence_quote: Harry Vaughan pleaded guilty to 14 terrorism offenses and possession of child pornography. Vaughan was connected to both National Action and Sonnenkrieg Division.

descriptions: The Verde clan fought with the Puca clan.
edges.evidence_quote: the Verde clan fought with the Puca and Ranucci clans

descriptions: Puca clan and Verde clan engaged in a shootout resulting in Puca's death.
edges.evidence_quote: Puca was murdered on February 7, 1989, after a long shoot out with members of the Verde clan in Sant'Antimo.

descriptions: The Verde clan fought with the Ranucci clan.
edges.evidence_quote: the Verde clan fought with the Puca and Ranucci clans

descriptions: South Side Compton Crips member Orlando Anderson engaged in a gunfight with Corner Poccet Crips members.
edges.evidence_quote: Anderson and his friend Michael Dorrough confronted Michael Stone and Jerry Stone, two members of the Corner Poccet Crips, as Anderson believed Michael owed his uncle money. A gunfight erupted

descriptions: Militias are listed as rivals of PCC in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Comando Vermelho , Família do Norte , Militias , Okaida [ pt ] , Bala na Cara [ pt ] , Primeiro Grupo Catarinense [ pt ] , Sindicato do Crime [ pt ] , Clan Rotela

descriptions: PCC lists Militias as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Comando Vermelho , Família do Norte , Militias , Okaida [ pt ] , Bala na Cara [ pt ] , Primeiro Grupo Catarinense [ pt ] , Sindicato do Crime [ pt ] , Clan Rotela

descriptions: Schirripa was part of an alliance with Coluccio, Aquino, and Macrì.
edges.evidence_quote: la quale faceva parte di un'alleanza con i Coluccio, gli Aquino e i Macrì

descriptions: Schirripa was part of an alliance with Coluccio, Aquino, and Macrì.
edges.evidence_quote: la quale faceva parte di un'alleanza con i Coluccio, gli Aquino e i Macrì

descriptions: Schirripa was part of an alliance with Coluccio, Aquino, and Macrì.
edges.evidence_quote: la quale faceva parte di un'alleanza con i Coluccio, gli Aquino e i Macrì

'Ndrina Talia.description: The Talia are a 'ndrina (organized crime family) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Bova, Reggio Calabria, Italy. They have been involved in public works corruption, particularly regarding the SS106 Jonica highway and the Palizzi road variant, controlling concrete supply, hiring, and subcontracting. The clan has been targeted in operations such as Bellu Lavuru 2 in 2012, which led to multiple arrests.

descriptions: Mimmo Crea favored Talia alongside Cordì, implying a cooperative relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 22 dicembre 2010 l'ex consigliere della Regione Calabria Mimmo Crea viene condannato in primo grado a 11 anni di carcere accusato di concorso esterno in associazione mafiosa favorendo i Morabito-Zavettieri , i Cordì e i Talia.

descriptions: Morabito and Talia were favored by politician Mimmo Crea, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 22 dicembre 2010 l'ex consigliere della Regione Calabria Mimmo Crea viene condannato in primo grado a 11 anni di carcere accusato di concorso esterno in associazione mafiosa favorendo i Morabito-Zavettieri, i Cordì e i Talia.

descriptions: Palamara, Morabito, Bruzzaniti, Talia, Vadalà, Rodà, and Maisano were all involved in conditioning public contracts.
edges.evidence_quote: arrestati diversi presunti affiliati e concorrenti esterni del clan Morabito-Palamara-Bruzzaniti, dei clan Talia e Vadalà di Bova e dei Rodà e Maisano

descriptions: The Rodà were arrested alongside the Talia clan in the same operation, indicating cooperation in influencing public contracts.
edges.evidence_quote: arrestati diversi presunti affiliati e concorrenti esterni del clan Morabito - Palamara - Bruzzaniti , dei clan Talia e Vadalà di Bova e dei Rodà e Maisano

descriptions: Talia and Rodà cooperated in influencing public contracts.
edges.evidence_quote: arrestati diversi presunti affiliati e concorrenti esterni del clan Morabito - Palamara - Bruzzaniti , dei clan Talia e Vadalà di Bova e dei Rodà e Maisano; secondo le indagini i clan avrebbero fortemente condizionato gli appalti pubblici

descriptions: The Talia and Vadalà clans are mentioned together as part of the same criminal network.
edges.evidence_quote: arrestati diversi presunti affiliati e concorrenti esterni del clan Morabito - Palamara -Bruzzaniti, dei clan Talia e Vadalà di Bova e dei Rodà e Maisano

descriptions: Talia and Vadalà cooperated in influencing public contracts.
edges.evidence_quote: arrestati diversi presunti affiliati e concorrenti esterni del clan Morabito - Palamara - Bruzzaniti , dei clan Talia e Vadalà di Bova e dei Rodà e Maisano; secondo le indagini i clan avrebbero fortemente condizionato gli appalti pubblici

descriptions: Talia and Morabito-Palamara-Bruzzaniti cooperated in influencing public contracts.
edges.evidence_quote: arrestati diversi presunti affiliati e concorrenti esterni del clan Morabito - Palamara - Bruzzaniti , dei clan Talia e Vadalà di Bova e dei Rodà e Maisano; secondo le indagini i clan avrebbero fortemente condizionato gli appalti pubblici

descriptions: Talia and Maisano cooperated in influencing public contracts.
edges.evidence_quote: arrestati diversi presunti affiliati e concorrenti esterni del clan Morabito - Palamara - Bruzzaniti , dei clan Talia e Vadalà di Bova e dei Rodà e Maisano; secondo le indagini i clan avrebbero fortemente condizionato gli appalti pubblici

descriptions: The Vadalà and Talia clans were both arrested in the same operation, indicating they were part of a criminal association.
edges.evidence_quote: Vengono arrestati diversi affiliati e concorrenti esterni del clan Morabito - Palamara - Bruzzaniti , dei clan Talia e Vadalà di Bova e dei Rodà e Maisano

'Ndrina Alvaro.description: The Alvaro 'ndrina is a powerful 'Ndrangheta clan from Sinopoli, Calabria, with about 2,000 affiliates. It operates in various Italian provinces and has international branches in Australia. The clan has been involved in feuds, kidnappings, drug trafficking, and has ties to other 'Ndrangheta families. It remains active.

descriptions: Alvaro is part of the Alvaro-Macrì-Violi group.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 9 giugno 2020 si conclude l'operazione Freeland che porta all'arresto di 20 persone affiliate o facenti riferimento alle 'ndrine degli Italiano-Papalia, Barbaro - Papalia e Alvaro-Macrì- Violi

descriptions: Alvaro, Pesce, and Coluccio-Aquino were involved in international drug trafficking together.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 17 giugno 2015 si conclude un'operazione ... che blocca un traffico internazionale di droga tra gli Alvaro, i Pesce e i Coluccio-Aquino

descriptions: Alvaro mediated peace between De Stefano and Condello after the second 'ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Al termine della seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta che vide contrapposti numerose 'ndrine tra cui i De Stefano, i Condello, i Rosmini, gli Imerti, i Tegano e i Serraino per intavolare la pace fece da mediatore tra l’Avvocato Giorgio De Stefano e Pasquale Condello Domenico Alvaro

descriptions: Alvaro and Crea were both implicated in arrests in Rizziconi.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 4 giugno 2014 a Rizziconi, su denuncia del sindaco e dopo due anni di indagini vengono arrestate 16 persone riconducibile alle 'ndrine Crea ed Alvaro.

descriptions: Alvaro and Gioffrè were opposing sides in the Faida di Sant'Eufemia d'Aspromonte.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Sant'Eufemia d'Aspromonte: inizia nel 1964 tra la famiglia Gioffrè e gli Alvaro.

descriptions: Alvaro had connections with Piromalli and Molè.
edges.evidence_quote: nell'operazione Cent'anni di storia collegamenti con i Piromalli e i Molè

descriptions: Alvaro co-owned the Cafè de Paris with Palamara.
edges.evidence_quote: il noto locale romano "Cafè de Paris è di proprietà di Damiano Villari e che è stato acquistato in parte anche dall'imprenditore perugino Stefano Todini per conto delle cosche Palamara e Alvaro

descriptions: Alvaro, Pesce, and Coluccio-Aquino were involved in international drug trafficking together.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 17 giugno 2015 si conclude un'operazione ... che blocca un traffico internazionale di droga tra gli Alvaro, i Pesce e i Coluccio-Aquino

descriptions: Alvaro had connections with Piromalli and Molè.
edges.evidence_quote: nell'operazione Cent'anni di storia collegamenti con i Piromalli e i Molè

descriptions: Alvaro had strong ties with Tegano for arms exchange.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel nuovo millennio con l'operazione Virus si scopre di forti legami con i Tegano per lo scambio di armi

descriptions: Alvaro and Violi were allied in the Faida di Sinopoli.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Sinopoli: nasce nel 1945 con l'omicidio di Giuseppe Filleti tra gli Alvaro - Violi -Macrì e i Filleti-De Angelis-Orfeo

descriptions: Violi supported Alvaro in the faida di Sinopoli.
edges.evidence_quote: Gli Alvaro, appoggiati dalle famiglie Forgione e Violi, per vent'anni dovettero regolare i conti con i Filleti-De Angelis-Orfeo.

descriptions: Alvaro-Macrì-Violi were linked to Italiano-Papalia and Barbaro-Papalia in the Freeland operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 9 giugno 2020 si conclude l'operazione Freeland che porta all'arresto di 20 persone affiliate o facenti riferimento alle 'ndrine degli Italiano-Papalia, Barbaro - Papalia e Alvaro-Macrì- Violi

descriptions: Alvaro collaborated with Casamonica and Piromalli-Molè for money laundering.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 25 marzo 2010 viene scoperto un sodalizio tra Pietro D'Ardes, Rocco Casamonica del clan dei Casamonica e i affiliati alla 'ndrangheta dei Piromalli - Molè e Alvaro per il riciclaggio dei proventi illeciti

descriptions: Alvaro and Macrì were allied in the Faida di Sinopoli.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Sinopoli: nasce nel 1945 con l'omicidio di Giuseppe Filleti tra gli Alvaro - Violi -Macrì e i Filleti-De Angelis-Orfeo

descriptions: Alvaro mediated peace between De Stefano and Condello after the second 'ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Al termine della seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta che vide contrapposti numerose 'ndrine tra cui i De Stefano, i Condello, i Rosmini, gli Imerti, i Tegano e i Serraino per intavolare la pace fece da mediatore tra l’Avvocato Giorgio De Stefano e Pasquale Condello Domenico Alvaro

descriptions: Alvaro and Filleti were opposing sides in the Faida di Sinopoli.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Sinopoli: nasce nel 1945 con l'omicidio di Giuseppe Filleti tra gli Alvaro - Violi -Macrì e i Filleti-De Angelis-Orfeo

descriptions: Alvaro was in conflict with Filleti-De Angelis-Orfeo during the faida di Sinopoli.
edges.evidence_quote: Gli Alvaro, appoggiati dalle famiglie Forgione e Violi, per vent'anni dovettero regolare i conti con i Filleti-De Angelis-Orfeo.

descriptions: Forgione supported Alvaro in the faida di Sinopoli.
edges.evidence_quote: Gli Alvaro, appoggiati dalle famiglie Forgione e Violi, per vent'anni dovettero regolare i conti con i Filleti-De Angelis-Orfeo.

descriptions: Alvaro-Macrì-Violi were linked to Italiano-Papalia and Barbaro-Papalia in the Freeland operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 9 giugno 2020 si conclude l'operazione Freeland che porta all'arresto di 20 persone affiliate o facenti riferimento alle 'ndrine degli Italiano-Papalia, Barbaro - Papalia e Alvaro-Macrì- Violi

descriptions: Alvaro, Pesce, and Coluccio-Aquino were involved in drug trafficking with a FARC commander.
edges.evidence_quote: blocca un traffico internazionale di droga tra gli Alvaro , i Pesce e i Coluccio-Aquino insieme ad un comandante delle FARC colombiane

descriptions: Alvaro intervened to broker peace between Condello and De Stefano.
edges.evidence_quote: La pax mafiosa è stata raggiunta solo con l'intervento di Cosa nostra , delle famiglie mafiose di New York , dalla cosca dei Nirta (La Maggiore) di San Luca e dagli Alvaro di Sinopoli

descriptions: Crea and Alvaro are both implicated in the same 2014 arrests, suggesting cooperation or shared criminal activities.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 4 giugno 2014 a Rizziconi, su denuncia del sindaco e dopo due anni di indagini vengono arrestate 16 persone riconducibile alle 'ndrine Crea ed Alvaro.

descriptions: Alvaro is listed as an allied 'ndrina of Imerti.
edges.evidence_quote: 'Ndrine alleate - Alvaro

descriptions: Domenico Alvaro mediated the peace between Imerti and De Stefano.
edges.evidence_quote: Domenico Alvaro , capo della locale di Sinopoli faceva da terzo mediatore.

descriptions: The Lanzino are allies of the Alvaro.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati degli Alvaro .

descriptions: Lo Presti had ties with Alvaro.
edges.evidence_quote: Ha avuto legami con tutte le più importanti famiglie mafiose della Calabria e della Sicilia . I Belfiore , i Tripodo , i Mesiani Mazzacuva, i Ruga , gli Aquino , gli Ierinò , i Macrì , i Morabito , i Varacalli , i Cataldo , gli Strangio , i Barbaro , gli Alvaro , i Palamara , i Raso-Albanese e i Facchineri .

descriptions: The Molè, Piromalli, Alvaro, and Casamonica clan were involved together in money laundering.
edges.evidence_quote: viene scoperto un sodalizio tra Pietro D'Ardes, Rocco Casamonica del clan dei Casamonica e affiliati alla 'Ndrangheta dei Piromalli -Molè e Alvaro per il riciclaggio dei proventi illeciti

descriptions: Palamara and Alvaro jointly purchased a nightclub in Rome.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 26 novembre 2008, su Repubblica viene reso noto che il noto locale romano "Cafè de Paris" è di proprietà di Damiano Villari e che è stato acquistato in parte anche dall'imprenditore perugino Stefano Todini per conto delle cosche Palamara e Alvaro .

descriptions: Pesce, Alvaro, and Coluccio-Aquino were involved together in international drug trafficking with FARC.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 17 giugno 2015 si conclude un'operazione ... che blocca un traffico internazionale di droga tra gli Alvaro , i Pesce e i Coluccio-Aquino insieme ad un comandante delle FARC colombiane .

descriptions: Pesce and Alvaro were targeted together in operation Vulcano for international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 3 agosto 2016 si conclude l'operazione "Vulcano" nei confronti di 12 presunti esponenti delle famiglie Piromalli , Molè , Alvaro e Pesce accusati di traffico internazionale di droga.

descriptions: Di Marte was accused of drug trafficking for both Pesce and Alvaro.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 16 aprile 2018 le forze dell'ordine arrestano ... Vincenzo Di Marte, latitante da giugno 2015 accusato di traffico di stupefacenti per i Pesce e gli Alvaro come riscontrato nell'operazione Santa Fè .

descriptions: Piromalli, Alvaro, and Molè were arrested together in operation Cent'anni di storia.
edges.evidence_quote: 23 luglio 2008 nell'operazione Cent'anni di storia vengono arrestate 18 persone degli Alvaro , Piromalli e Molè

descriptions: Piromalli and Alvaro cooperated in money laundering.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 25 marzo 2010 viene scoperto un sodalizio tra Pietro D'Ardes, Rocco Casamonica del clan dei Casamonica e affiliati alla 'ndrangheta dei Piromalli- Molè e Alvaro per il riciclaggio dei proventi illeciti

descriptions: Domenico Alvaro mediated the peace between Imerti and De Stefano.
edges.evidence_quote: Domenico Alvaro , capo della locale di Sinopoli faceva da terzo mediatore.

descriptions: The Violi are allied with the Alvaro.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati degli Alvaro.

descriptions: Aquino has agreements with Alvaro for international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Hanno numerosi accordi in virtù dei traffici di droga internazionale con le altre 'ndrine tra cui: ... gli Alvaro di Sinopoli

descriptions: Takfir wal-Hijra is a breakaway group from the Muslim Brotherhood.
edges.evidence_quote: There have been breakaway groups from the movement, including the al-Jama'a al-Islamiyya and Takfir wal-Hijra.

Sydney Ducks.description: A gang of criminal immigrants from Australia operating in San Francisco during the mid-19th century. Many were former convicts from British penal colonies in Australia, and they were blamed for an 1849 fire and rampant crime. Their activities led to the formation of the first Committee of Vigilance in 1851, which effectively decimated the gang through lynchings and deportations.

descriptions: The Sydney Ducks' criminal activities led to the formation of the Committee of Vigilance, which targeted them.
edges.evidence_quote: The criminality of the Sydney Ducks was the catalyst for the formation of the first Committee of Vigilance of 1851.

Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction.description: A crew of Italian-American mobsters operating in Northern New Jersey, part of the Lucchese crime family. Active since the 1920s, it was led by Anthony Accetturo and Michael Taccetta in the 1970s-1980s. A war with New York members in the late 1980s led to defections and convictions. Currently controlled by Joseph R. Perna.

edges.source: Genovese crime family New Jersey faction
edges.target: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
descriptions: The New Jersey faction is allied with the Lucchese crime family's New Jersey faction.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno, Colombo, DeCavalcante, Detroit, Gambino, Lucchese (New Jersey faction), Philadelphia, K&A Gang

edges.source: Genovese crime family New Jersey faction
edges.target: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno, Colombo, DeCavalcante, Detroit, Gambino, Lucchese (New Jersey faction), Philadelphia, K&A Gang

edges.source: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
descriptions: The Jersey crew formed from members of the disbanding Badami Newark family.
edges.evidence_quote: The Badami Newark family began to break apart, as many members joined the Gagliano-Lucchese family becoming the newly formed Jersey crew, while other members stayed with Gaspare D'Amico.

edges.source: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
descriptions: Joseph Abate maintained close ties to a Bonanno family caporegime.
edges.evidence_quote: Abate maintained close ties to Genovese family, Philadelphia family, the DeCavalcante family and Bonnano family caporegime Joseph Zicarelli.

descriptions: Members of the New Jersey faction and Gambino family were indicted together, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: Martin Taccetta was indicted along with Gambino crime family capo Andrew Merola on racketeering, gambling and labor corruption.

edges.source: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
descriptions: The infobox lists Gambino as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno, Colombo, DeCavalcante, Gambino, Genovese (New Jersey faction), Philadelphia

edges.source: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
descriptions: Angelo Taccetta, father of Jersey crew members, took over a Genovese gambling network, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1975, Angelo Taccetta the father of Michael and Martin Taccetta, assumed control of the Genovese family's Newark gambling network run by soldier Anthony Campisi.

edges.source: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
edges.target: Genovese crime family New Jersey faction
descriptions: Joseph Abate, leader of the Jersey crew, maintained close ties to the Genovese family's New Jersey faction.
edges.evidence_quote: Abate maintained close ties to Genovese family, Philadelphia family, the DeCavalcante family and Bonnano family caporegime Joseph Zicarelli.

edges.source: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
descriptions: The New York leadership of the Lucchese family ordered the elimination of the New Jersey faction after a dispute over tribute.
edges.evidence_quote: When they demanded 50% of the crew's total profit, both Taccetta and Accetturo reportedly refused, portraying themselves as hard-working money machines that were only having a bad year. Amuso and Casso, on the other hand, saw this as an act of weakness, and gave the order to 'Whack Jersey', meaning that the entire North Jersey faction should be eliminated.

edges.source: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
descriptions: The New Jersey faction is a crew within the Lucchese crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: The New Jersey faction of the Lucchese crime family , also known as the Jersey Crew , is a powerful crew of Italian-American mobsters which operates throughout the Northern New Jersey area.

edges.source: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
descriptions: The New Jersey faction is a part of the Lucchese crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: The New Jersey faction of the Lucchese crime family

edges.source: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
descriptions: The New Jersey faction allied with Nine Trey Gangsters to smuggle drugs and phones into prison.
edges.evidence_quote: members of the Lucchese family's New Jersey faction had an alliance with a New Jersey corrections officer and members of the Nine Trey Gangster's (a set of the Bloods) to smuggle drugs and pre-paid cell phones into East Jersey State Prison

edges.source: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
descriptions: Cooperation between the Lucchese family (including its New Jersey faction) and the Philadelphia family ended after Bruno's murder.
edges.evidence_quote: Because of the bad relations between the two factions in Philadelphia's crime family, as well as both Taccetta and Accetturo taking advantage of the situation, the relationship between Philadelphia and the New York Families , especially the Luccheses, eventually turned worse after the murder of Angelo Bruno, which led to all cooperation between the families being completely terminated.

edges.source: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
descriptions: Joseph Abate maintained close ties to the Philadelphia crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: Abate maintained close ties to Genovese family, Philadelphia family, the DeCavalcante family and Bonnano family caporegime Joseph Zicarelli.

descriptions: The Americans and The British are opposing camps in Cape Town street gangs.
edges.evidence_quote: Cape Town streets gangs are split into two camps, The Americans and the British, formerly known as The Firm.

descriptions: The British are aligned with the 28 prison number gang.
edges.evidence_quote: whilst the British are aligned to the 28 prison number gang.

descriptions: Italian mobsters helped form the National Crime Syndicate.
edges.evidence_quote: they formed a loosely organized, mostly Jewish and Italian criminal syndicate which the press named the 'National Crime Syndicate'

descriptions: Bugs and Meyer Mob founders helped form the National Crime Syndicate and contributed to its enforcement arm.
edges.evidence_quote: When Lansky and Luciano formed the National Crime Syndicate in the early 1930s, Lansky, along with Siegel, pushed for a special outfit to handle 'enforcement,' or murders for the entire syndicate.

descriptions: Cleveland boss Frank Milano joined the National Crime Syndicate.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1931, Milano joined the National Crime Syndicate, a network of powerful criminals which included Charles 'Lucky' Luciano and Meyer Lansky.

descriptions: Mickey Cohen worked under Bugsy Siegel, a boss of the National Crime Syndicate.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1939, Cohen arrived in Los Angeles to work under Siegel, a sitting boss of the National Crime Syndicate.

descriptions: Syndicate worked for Hells Angels as drug dealers and killers.
edges.evidence_quote: The Syndicate ... served as drug dealers and killers for the Angels

descriptions: Jewish mobsters helped form the National Crime Syndicate.
edges.evidence_quote: they formed a loosely organized, mostly Jewish and Italian criminal syndicate which the press named the 'National Crime Syndicate'

descriptions: Murder, Inc. was the enforcement arm of the National Crime Syndicate.
edges.evidence_quote: Murder, Inc. ... acted as the enforcement arm of the National Crime Syndicate

descriptions: The National Crime Syndicate included the Italian-American Mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: a closely connected criminal organization that included the Italian-American Mafia

descriptions: The National Crime Syndicate included the Jewish Mob.
edges.evidence_quote: a closely connected criminal organization that included the Italian-American Mafia, the Jewish Mob

descriptions: Murder, Inc. was portrayed as an enforcement arm of the National Crime Syndicate.
edges.evidence_quote: During the 1930s and 1940s, newspapers and prosecutors used the term Murder, Inc. to describe a series of killings carried out by loosely connected criminal figures, many of them based in Brooklyn’s Brownsville neighborhood. Contemporary media accounts portrayed these murders as the work of a centralized, nationwide enforcement arm serving organized crime leadership.

descriptions: Schultz proposed a murder to the National Crime Syndicate, which later voted against it.
edges.evidence_quote: Schultz had proposed to the National Crime Syndicate, a confederation of mobsters, that Dewey be murdered.

descriptions: North Side Gang lost control of gambling operations to the National Crime Syndicate.
edges.evidence_quote: Moran and the North Side Gang eventually lost control of their gambling operations to the new National Crime Syndicate

descriptions: Crack Down Posse listed as an ally of Rockers MC in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Hells Angels MC Death Riders MC , Evil Ones MC , The Syndicate , Redliners , Crack Down Posse

descriptions: Zwillman's organization was a member of the National Crime Syndicate.
edges.evidence_quote: Zwillman's criminal organization was a part of the National Crime Syndicate

Marginals.description: New York street gang active in the early 1900s, based on the Lower West Side between Tenth and Ninth Avenues. Led by stevedore Thomas F. 'Tanner' Smith, the gang succeeded the Hudson Dusters and was involved in extortion and labor slugging. They were suppressed by police crackdowns in the 1910s, and Smith was killed in 1919, leading to the gang's dissolution.

descriptions: Hudson Dusters battled Marginals for control of docks.
edges.evidence_quote: While the gang dominated the West Side, it constantly battled smaller rival gangs including the Fashion Plates, the Pearl Buttons, and the Marginals for control of the Hudson River docks throughout the 1900s.

descriptions: Marginals drove Hudson Dusters from their territory in 1914.
edges.evidence_quote: By 1914 however, with most of its leaders in jail or dead from drug overdoses, the remainder of the gang were driven from their territory by the Marginals under Tanner Smith

descriptions: Infobox lists Marginals as a rival of Hudson Dusters.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ... Marginals

descriptions: Members of Marginals and Car Barn Gang were arrested together, suggesting cooperation or shared activity.
edges.evidence_quote: eight members of the Tanner Smiths were apprehended along with members of the Gas House and Car Barn Gangs in September 1910

descriptions: Members of Marginals and Gas House Gang were arrested together, suggesting cooperation or shared activity.
edges.evidence_quote: eight members of the Tanner Smiths were apprehended along with members of the Gas House and Car Barn Gangs in September 1910

descriptions: Marginals leader pursued a Hudson Dusters member with a gun, showing conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Smith was witnessed pursuing a member of the Hudson Dusters with a revolver in his hand

descriptions: Marginals succeeded Hudson Dusters in territory, indicating a structural succession.
edges.evidence_quote: succeeded the longtime Hudson Dusters in their territory of New York's Lower West Side

descriptions: Marginals drove out the Pearl Buttons, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: After driving out the rival Hudson Dusters and the Pearl Buttons

descriptions: De Angelis and Orfeo were allied in the Faida di Sinopoli.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Sinopoli: nasce nel 1945 con l'omicidio di Giuseppe Filleti tra gli Alvaro - Violi -Macrì e i Filleti-De Angelis-Orfeo

descriptions: Filleti and De Angelis were allied in the Faida di Sinopoli.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Sinopoli: nasce nel 1945 con l'omicidio di Giuseppe Filleti tra gli Alvaro - Violi -Macrì e i Filleti-De Angelis-Orfeo

'Ndrina Anello.description: The 'Ndrina Anello is a 'ndrina (mafia clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Filadelfia, Calabria, Italy. Its activities include robberies, extortion, and drug trafficking. The clan has been involved in several operations by Italian authorities, including Operation Conquista, Effetto Domino, and Via col vento. It has interests in various towns in the province of Vibo Valentia and has been in conflict with other 'ndrine.

descriptions: Anello and Bonavota had joint commercial interests in Maierato and share the area of Pizzo.
edges.evidence_quote: Insieme ai Cracolici e ai Bonavota avrebbero avuto interessi commerciali su Maierato mentre a Pizzo l'area e suddivisa solo con i Bonavota

descriptions: Anello and Cerra-Torcasio-Gualtieri were targeted together in Operation Effetto Domino, indicating a relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: 5 giugno 2008 - Operazione Effetto Domino contro gli Anello- Fruci , i Cerra-Torcasio-Gualtieri , gli Iannazzo e i Passafaro

descriptions: Anello and Cracolici had joint commercial interests in Maierato.
edges.evidence_quote: Insieme ai Cracolici e ai Bonavota avrebbero avuto interessi commerciali su Maierato

descriptions: Anello and Fruci were targeted together in Operation Prima, indicating alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: 7 gennaio 2003 - Operazione Prima contro gli Anello- Fruci e i Vallelunga

descriptions: Anello and Iannazzo were targeted together in Operation Effetto Domino, and Rocco Anello had good relations with Iannazzo.
edges.evidence_quote: 5 giugno 2008 - Operazione Effetto Domino contro gli Anello- Fruci , i Cerra-Torcasio-Gualtieri , gli Iannazzo e i Passafaro

descriptions: Anello and Mancuso were targeted together in Operation Rubamazzo, indicating a relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: 2 dicembre 2011: Operazione Rubamazzo contro i Mancuso e gli Anello-Fiumara

descriptions: Anello and Passafaro were targeted together in Operation Effetto Domino, indicating a relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: 5 giugno 2008 - Operazione Effetto Domino contro gli Anello- Fruci , i Cerra-Torcasio-Gualtieri , gli Iannazzo e i Passafaro

descriptions: Anello and Paviglianiti were targeted together in Operation Via col vento, indicating a relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 12 luglio 2018 si conclude l'operazione Via col vento che porta all'arresto di 13 persone presunte sodali delle 'ndrine Paviglianiti , Mancuso , Anello e Trapasso

descriptions: Anello and Trapasso were targeted together in Operation Via col vento, indicating a relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 12 luglio 2018 si conclude l'operazione Via col vento che porta all'arresto di 13 persone presunte sodali delle 'ndrine Paviglianiti , Mancuso , Anello e Trapasso

descriptions: Anello and Vallelunga were targeted together in Operation Prima, indicating a relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: 7 gennaio 2003 - Operazione Prima contro gli Anello- Fruci e i Vallelunga

descriptions: Bonavota is allied with Anello.
edges.evidence_quote: The Bonavota are allies of the Anello, Lo Bianco and Mancuso 'ndrina.

descriptions: The Bonavota are allies of the Anello.
edges.evidence_quote: sono alleati degli Anello , dei Lo Bianco e dei Mancuso

descriptions: The Fruci and Anello clans were jointly targeted in Operation Prima, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: 7 gennaio 2003 - Operazione "Prima" contro gli Anello -Fruci e i Vallelunga .

descriptions: Mancuso and Anello-Fiumara were targeted together in operation Rubamazzo, indicating they were both targets but not necessarily cooperating.
edges.evidence_quote: operazione "Rubamazzo" contro i Mancuso e gli Anello-Fiumara

descriptions: Paviglianiti, Mancuso, Anello and Trapasso were co-conspirators in wind farm infiltration.
edges.evidence_quote: operazione Via col vento che porta all'arresto di 13 persone presunte sodali delle 'ndrine Paviglianiti, Mancuso, Anello e Trapasso

descriptions: Trapasso and Anello are sodali (allied) in the same criminal operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 12 luglio 2018 si conclude l'operazione Via col vento che porta all'arresto di 13 persone sodali delle 'ndrine Paviglianiti , Mancuso , Anello e Trapasso

descriptions: Vallelunga and Anello-Fruci were targeted together in Operation Prima, implying a cooperative or structural tie.
edges.evidence_quote: Operazione Prima contro gli Anello - Fruci e i Vallelunga

descriptions: Mancuso 'ndrina has links with Arena 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: links with the Arena 'ndrina of Isola di Capo Rizzuto

descriptions: Clan Piarulli-Ferraro is the direct continuation of clan Cappellari-Caputo.
edges.evidence_quote: A Cerignola operano il clan Piarulli-Ferraro (diretta prosecuzione del clan Cappellari-Caputo, affiliato alla Nuova Camorra Pugliese negli anni '80)

descriptions: Turkey listed as opponent in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... Turkey

descriptions: Turkey is an opponent of SDF.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... Turkey

descriptions: JRC unites MEND, RNDPVF, and MB for common action.
edges.evidence_quote: JRC : Formado en enero de 2006, grupo armado que trata de agrupar y la acción común de los distintos grupos guerrilleros, agrupa al MEND, al RNDPVF y a la MB

descriptions: JRC is controlled by MB.
edges.evidence_quote: El JRC se halla controlado por el MB.

descriptions: Bellocco was in conflict with the Amato family, with a possible war prevented by arrests.
edges.evidence_quote: operazione ... Rosarno è Nostro che porta all'arresto di 6 membri dei Bellocco ... per prevenire una possibile guerra a Bologna con l'emergente famiglia di etnia rom degli Amato.

Sigue Sigue Sputnik.description: Filipino street gang based in Tondo, Manila, founded in the 1960s. One of the largest and most well-known gangs in the Philippines, with influence extending through slums and major penitentiaries. Known for elaborate tattoos and a strict code of conduct. Engaged in drug trafficking, arms trafficking, and murder.

descriptions: Bahala Na Gang members were captured together with Sputnik gang members in a drug bust, suggesting cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: gang members Robert Yabut and Raymart Yabut were captured in a buy-bust operation together with members of the Sputnik gang

descriptions: Sputniks fought against an alliance of Sigue Sigue Commando and Abu Sayyaf during the 2020 prison riots.
edges.evidence_quote: the gang retaliated against an alliance of Sigue Sigue Commando and Abu Sayyaf convicts

descriptions: Bahala Na Gang is listed as a rival of Sigue Sigue Sputnik in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bahala Na Gang , Sigue Sigue Commandos

descriptions: Sputniks viewed the Oxo group as invaders and enemies.
edges.evidence_quote: The motto of the gang was 'He who comes to destroy us, will himself be destroyed' which is a direct reference to the Visayan gangs like the Oxo group who the Sputniks felt had 'invaded' the Tagalog territory of Manila.

descriptions: Sigue Sigue Commandos are the most ardent rival of Sigue Sigue Sputnik.
edges.evidence_quote: the other one being Sigue Sigue Commandos, who are the Sputnik's most ardent rival.

descriptions: Sputniks fought against an alliance of Sigue Sigue Commando and Abu Sayyaf during the 2020 prison riots.
edges.evidence_quote: the gang retaliated against an alliance of Sigue Sigue Commando and Abu Sayyaf convicts

Shinwa-kai.description: The Shinwa-kai is a yakuza group based in Takamatsu, Kagawa, Japan, with an estimated 30 active members. It was renamed from the Takamatsu Shinwa-kai in 1971 and became a designated yakuza group in December 1992. It is the only designated yakuza group based in the Shikoku region and has been a member of the anti-Yamaguchi federation Gosha-kai since 1996.

descriptions: Goda-ikka and Shinwa-kai are both members of the Gosha-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 1996, the Goda-ikka has been a member of an anti- Yamaguchi federation, the Gosha-kai, along with three other Chugoku -based organizations, the Kyosei-kai , the Kyodo-kai , the Asano-gumi , and the Shikoku -based Shinwa-kai .

descriptions: Shinwa-kai is a member of the Gosha-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 1996, the Asano-gumi has been a member of an anti-Yamaguchi federation named the Gosha-kai, along with three other Chugoku-based organizations, the Kyosei-kai, the Kyodo-kai, the Goda-ikka, and the Shikoku-based Shinwa-kai.

descriptions: Kyodo-kai and Shinwa-kai are both members of the Gosha-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 1996, the Kyodo-kai has been a member of an anti-Yamaguchi federation named the Gosha-kai, along with three other Chugoku-based organizations, the Kyosei-kai, the Asano-gumi, the Goda-ikka, and the Shikoku-based Shinwa-kai.

descriptions: Kyosei-kai formed Gosha-kai with Shinwa-kai as a fellow member.
edges.evidence_quote: and has formed a new anti-Yamaguchi federation named the Gosha-kai since 1996 with three other Chugoku-based organizations, the Kyodo-kai, the Asano-gumi, the Goda-ikka, and the Shikoku-based Shinwa-kai.

descriptions: Shinwa-kai and Asano-gumi are both members of the Gosha-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 1996, the Shinwa-kai has been a member of an anti- Yamaguchi federation named the Gosha-kai, along with four Chugoku -based organizations, the Kyosei-kai , the Kyodo-kai , the Goda-ikka , and the Asano-gumi .

descriptions: Shinwa-kai and Goda-ikka are both members of the Gosha-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 1996, the Shinwa-kai has been a member of an anti- Yamaguchi federation named the Gosha-kai, along with four Chugoku -based organizations, the Kyosei-kai , the Kyodo-kai , the Goda-ikka , and the Asano-gumi .

descriptions: Shinwa-kai is a member of the Gosha-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 1996, the Shinwa-kai has been a member of an anti- Yamaguchi federation named the Gosha-kai, along with four Chugoku -based organizations, the Kyosei-kai , the Kyodo-kai , the Goda-ikka , and the Asano-gumi .

descriptions: Shinwa-kai and Kyodo-kai are both members of the Gosha-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 1996, the Shinwa-kai has been a member of an anti- Yamaguchi federation named the Gosha-kai, along with four Chugoku -based organizations, the Kyosei-kai , the Kyodo-kai , the Goda-ikka , and the Asano-gumi .

descriptions: Shinwa-kai and Kyosei-kai are both members of the Gosha-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 1996, the Shinwa-kai has been a member of an anti- Yamaguchi federation named the Gosha-kai, along with four Chugoku -based organizations, the Kyosei-kai , the Kyodo-kai , the Goda-ikka , and the Asano-gumi .

descriptions: Shinwa-kai is part of an anti-Yamaguchi federation, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 1996, the Shinwa-kai has been a member of an anti- Yamaguchi federation named the Gosha-kai

descriptions: Shinwa-kai is listed as an ally of Yamaguchi-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Inagawa-kai, Soai-kai, Matsuba-kai, Kyōsei-kai, Aizukotetsu-kai, Toa-kai, Fukuhaku-kai, Gōda-ikka, Shinwa-kai

Honda-kai.description: The Honda-kai were a Japanese yakuza gang active in Kobe in the mid-20th century. They were a bakuto gang primarily involved in illegal gambling. After World War II, they allied with the Yamaguchi-gumi but were soon absorbed and ceased to be independent. An American Yamaguchi-gumi syndicate may have reused the name in the mid-2000s.

descriptions: Honda-kai and Yamaguchi-gumi formed an alliance after World War II.
edges.evidence_quote: After World War II , they formed an alliance with the Yamaguchi-gumi syndicate

descriptions: Honda-kai was absorbed into Yamaguchi-gumi, ceasing independent operation.
edges.evidence_quote: the Honda-kai were soon absorbed into the Yamaguchi-gumi's ranks and ceased to be an independent operation

descriptions: Hongmen's predecessor Tiandihui is described as being in the vein of White Lotus Society, which is its ancestral organization.
edges.evidence_quote: The Hongmen (Vast Family), formerly Tiandihui (Heaven and Earth Society), is a Chinese fraternal organisation and historically a secretive folk religious sect in the vein of the Ming loyalist and anti-Qing White Lotus Society, the Tiandihui's ancestral organisation.

descriptions: Zaynabiyat is the female police wing of the Houthis.
edges.evidence_quote: Torture of female detainees is also carried out by the Zaynabiyat, the Houthi female police wing.

descriptions: Bandidos bombed Screwdriver MC clubhouse during the Nordic Biker War.
edges.evidence_quote: a bomb was detonated at the clubhouse of Hells Angels hangaround club Screwdriver MC in Hamar

descriptions: Mai-Mai groups were active in areas controlled by RCD-Goma during the Second Congo War.
edges.evidence_quote: While militias have long been common in the Kivus, particularly among the minority Batembo and Babembe ethnic groups, the recent wars and conflicts caused large numbers of town dwellers to form Mai-Mai.

edges.source: Mouvement de Lutte contre l'Agression au Zaïre / Forces Unies de Résistance Nationale contre l'Agression de la Républíque Démocratique du Congo
descriptions: MLAZ/FURNAC was reported to cooperate with RCD-Goma.
edges.evidence_quote: A number of smaller Mai-Mai groups, such as the Mudundu 40 / Front de Résistance et de Défense du Kivu (FRDKI) and Mouvement de Lutte contre l'Agression au Zaïre / Forces Unies de Résistance Nationale contre l'Agression de la Républíque Démocratique du Congo (MLAZ/FURNAC), were reported to cooperate with the Rwandan military and Rally for Congolese Democracy–Goma (RCD-Goma).

edges.source: Mudundu 40 / Front de Résistance et de Défense du Kivu
descriptions: FRDKI was reported to cooperate with RCD-Goma.
edges.evidence_quote: A number of smaller Mai-Mai groups, such as the Mudundu 40 / Front de Résistance et de Défense du Kivu (FRDKI) and Mouvement de Lutte contre l'Agression au Zaïre / Forces Unies de Résistance Nationale contre l'Agression de la Républíque Démocratique du Congo (MLAZ/FURNAC), were reported to cooperate with the Rwandan military and Rally for Congolese Democracy–Goma (RCD-Goma).

descriptions: Pelletier Clan sought protection from Hells Angels due to conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Pelletier asked that the police provide him with protection from the Angels

descriptions: Pelletier Clan was a member of the Alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: the Pelletier Clan and the Rock Machine were the most visible parts of the Alliance to Fight The Angels

descriptions: Both were members of the Alliance to Fight the Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: the Pelletier Clan and the Rock Machine were the most visible parts of the Alliance to Fight The Angels

descriptions: Rock Machine formed the Alliance with Pelletier Clan against Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: The local Rock Machine Motorcycle Club formed an affiliation, the Alliance, with Montreal crime families such as the Pelletier Clan, Dark Circle and other independent dealers who wished to resist the Hells Angels' attempts to establish a monopoly on street-level drug trade in the city.

descriptions: The Rock Machine and Pelletier Clan conspired together to murder a Hells Angels leader.
edges.evidence_quote: Serge Cyr was placed under arrest and charged with conspiracy along with 13 others including members of the Rock Machine, Pelletier Clan and Palmers MC for planning the murder of Hells Angels president Maurice "Mom" Boucher.

descriptions: The Corsican Mafia (via Francisci) was at war with the Guérini clan.
edges.evidence_quote: The second war occurred between 1965 and 1967 against the powerful Guérini clan.

descriptions: Guérini clan was a ruling dynasty within the Corsican Mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: The second war occurred between 1965 and 1967 against the powerful Guérini clan. At that time, the Guérini clan was the ruling dynasty of the Corsican Mafia

descriptions: Guérini clan ruled Unione Corse after Carbone's death.
edges.evidence_quote: After Paul Carbone's death, the Guérini clan was the ruling dynasty of the Unione Corse

descriptions: Milieu sought revenge against the Guérini clan for killing Robert Blémant.
edges.evidence_quote: The murder was supported by the Milieu gang, who wanted revenge for the killing of Robert Blémant by the Guérini clan.

descriptions: El Chapo Isidro allied with La Mayiza (MZ/MF faction) in early May 2025.
edges.evidence_quote: "El Chapo Isidro" forms alliance with La Mayiza in Early May 2025

descriptions: El Chapo Isidro allied with La Mayiza (MZ/MF faction) in early May 2025.
edges.evidence_quote: "El Chapo Isidro" forms alliance with La Mayiza in Early May 2025

descriptions: Los Sinaloas is a criminal cell linked to Unión Tepito.
edges.evidence_quote: Luis Angel López Orea, alias El Pollo, líder de la célula delictiva "Los Sinaloas", ligadas a la Unión

descriptions: The Dubois Brothers outmuscled a motorcycle gang to take over the drug market.
edges.evidence_quote: This allowed the Brothers to wipe out the rival Irish gang and to take over the lucrative drug market by out muscling a motorcycle gang.

descriptions: 7th and Stratford Gang were allied under the name Northside Newham.
edges.evidence_quote: Lekan "CB" Akinsoji and Nathaniel Lewis, both members of 7th, were sentenced to 23 years in prison ... alongside Darnell "D Boy" Joseph-Newill and Troy Ifill, members of the Stratford Gang. The group were under an alliance known as "Northside Newham"

descriptions: Africa Corps rescued hostages from Jama'at Nusrat al-Islam wal-Muslimin, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: The corps rescued two employees of a Russian geological exploration company who were abducted by Jama'at Nusrat al-Islam wal-Muslimin in Niger two years earlier.

descriptions: JNIM is a direct affiliate of al-Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: Al-Qaeda has the following direct affiliates: - Jama'at Nasr al-Islam wal-Muslimin (JNIM)

descriptions: JNIM is a group (affiliate) of al-Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: Group: Groups: JNIM, AQAP, AQIM, Al-Shabaab, AQIS, Ansaru

descriptions: JNIM is listed as a group under Al-Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: Groups: JNIM , AQAP , AQIM , Al-Shabaab , AQIS , Ansaru

descriptions: JNIM is listed as a group under al-Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: Group: Groups: JNIM

descriptions: AQIM's Sahara branch merged into JNIM.
edges.evidence_quote: On 2 March 2017, the Sahara branch of AQIM merged with Macina Liberation Front, Ansar Dine, and al-Mourabitoun, into Jama'at Nasr al-Islam wal Muslimin.

descriptions: Jama'at Nasr al-Islam wal-Muslimin pledged allegiance to the Taliban government.
edges.evidence_quote: Many designated terror groups have pledged their allegiance to the new Taliban government, these groups include: Al-Qaeda, al Shabaab, Boko Haram, Jama'at Nasr al-Islam wal-Muslimin and Turkistan Islamic Party, Tehreek-e-Taliban Pakistan, Harkat-ul-Mujahideen.

descriptions: JNIM ambushed and killed Wagner soldiers in Mali.
edges.evidence_quote: On 21 November, at least seven Wagner soldiers were killed by al-Qaeda affiliate JNIM in an ambush on a convoy in the Mopti region.

descriptions: Bandidos members shot and wounded a Lepakko Gang member.
edges.evidence_quote: Bandidos Helsinki chapter president Pentti Tapio Haapanen and vice-president Harri Tapio Reinikainen were convicted of shooting and wounding a Rogues Gallery member and a member of the Lepakko Gang in Sörnäinen, Helsinki in July 2005.

descriptions: The Cotroni family feuded with the Blass gang.
edges.evidence_quote: the Cotronis engaged in a violent feud with French-Canadian mobster Richard Blass

descriptions: M23 lists MONUSCO as an opponent.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... MONUSCO

descriptions: MONUSCO is listed as an opponent of M23 in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... MONUSCO

descriptions: The FDN was part of the reorganization into UNO.
edges.evidence_quote: In June 1985 most of the groups reorganized as the United Nicaraguan Opposition (UNO)

descriptions: The RN succeeded UNO as the umbrella group for Contra factions.
edges.evidence_quote: After UNO's dissolution early in 1987, the Nicaraguan Resistance (RN) was organized along similar lines in May.

descriptions: Lal crew was founded by former Independent Soldiers members.
edges.evidence_quote: two members, namely Michael Justin Lal and his brother Corey Jason Lal, both left the Independent Soldiers to found their own gang, the Lal crew.

descriptions: Clan Cappello and Famiglia di Catania are considered the most powerful mafia groups in eastern Sicily.
edges.evidence_quote: È considerata insieme alla Famiglia di Catania , di Nitto Santapaola , la cosca catanese più potente della Sicilia orientale.
